message:
refactor: add dev profiling and improve component organization

client-shell.tsx:
- Add React Profiler wrapper in development mode
- Store render timing data in window.__reactProfile for debugging
- Conditionally wrap content to avoid production overhead

notable-stargazers.tsx:
- Improve component organization (linter improvements)

use-intersection-observer.ts:
- Minor refactoring improvements

hero.tsx:
- Component refinements
